user_request: Blessing for the medicae scanner during activation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the medicae scanner during activation

### TOPIC
medicae scanner activation

### COMPONENT
medicae scanner

### OPERATION
activation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- medicae scanner
- activation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the medicae scanner in this hour of necessity.
First: Genuflect before the medicae scanner and anoint its optical lenses with sacred unguents, invoking the Machine Spirit within.
Second: Recite the Litany of Activation whilst the medicae scanner's power conduits hum with the Omnissiah's grace.
Third: Calibrate the medicae scanner's diagnostic arrays through ritual incantation, that it may perceive the infirmities of flesh and bone.
Fourth: Seal the rite with the sign of the Cog, and the medicae scanner shall serve faithfully.

user_request: Rite request: capacitor bank discharge on capacitor bank
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: capacitor bank discharge on capacitor bank

### TOPIC
capacitor bank discharge

### COMPONENT
capacitor bank

### OPERATION
capacitor bank discharge

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- capacitor bank
- capacitor bank discharge

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Omnissiah, grant us the wisdom to channel the sacred energies through the capacitor bank.
First: Approach the capacitor bank with reverence and place your hands upon its housing to sense the accumulated charge.
Second: Intone the Mantra of Discharge as you initiate capacitor bank discharge through the primary conduit, releasing pent energies unto the void.
Third: Monitor the capacitor bank's discharge cascade with vigilant attention, ensuring no surge corrupts the connected systems.
Fourth: Upon completion, offer thanks to the Machine Spirit for safe passage of the liberated power.

user_request: Rite request: track tension on Land Raider
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: track tension on Land Raider

### TOPIC
Land Raider track tension

### COMPONENT
Land Raider

### OPERATION
track tension

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Land Raider
- track tension

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear us, O Land Raider, noble steed of the Imperium.
First: Inspect the Land Raider's track tension with practiced hands, measuring deviation from the sacred specifications.
Second: Adjust the Land Raider's tensioning mechanisms with deliberate precision, ensuring the tracks grip with proper force upon terra firma.
Third: Apply the blessed lubricant to the track assembly, that the Land Raider may roll forth without friction or complaint.
Fourth: Perform a final validation of the Land Raider's mobility, and declare the rite complete.

user_request: Prayer for operation of the ground-to-orbit link
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for operation of the ground-to-orbit link

### TOPIC
ground-to-orbit link

### COMPONENT
ground-to-orbit link

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- ground-to-orbit link
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
By the will of the Omnissiah, we establish communion betwixt world and void.
First: Activate the ground-to-orbit link's primary transmission array, chanting the Frequency Litany to align its resonance.
Second: Establish the ground-to-orbit link's data pathway through sacred geometry and electromagnetic invocation.
Third: Test the ground-to-orbit link's signal integrity by transmitting the Ritual Acknowledgment to the orbital station above.
Fourth: Maintain vigilant observation of the ground-to-orbit link's operation, that no interference corrupts the blessed communion.

user_request: Blessing for the overheating during prevention
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the overheating during prevention

### TOPIC
overheating prevention

### COMPONENT
overheating

### OPERATION
prevention

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- overheating
- prevention

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Machine Spirit, grant us cool respite from the fires of malfunction.
First: Inspect the overheating's source with thermal auguries, identifying the locus of excessive heat generation.
Second: Engage overheating prevention protocols by clearing heat-dissipation pathways and restoring proper coolant circulation.
Third: Recalibrate the overheating's thermal thresholds through sacred mathematics, ensuring the system never again approaches critical temperature.
Fourth: Bless the cooled mechanism with the sign of the Cog, and declare overheating prevention achieved.

user_request: Emergency rite: capacitor bank requires capacitor bank discharge
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: capacitor bank requires capacitor bank discharge

### TOPIC
capacitor bank discharge

### COMPONENT
capacitor bank

### OPERATION
capacitor bank discharge

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- capacitor bank
- capacitor bank discharge

### PRAYER
prayer:
In extremis, we call upon the Omnissiah for swift capacitor bank discharge.
First: Assess the capacitor bank's charge state with urgency, determining the magnitude of energy requiring liberation.
Second: Execute capacitor bank discharge through emergency protocols, venting excess power through designated conduits with haste.
Third: Monitor the capacitor bank's discharge rate continuously, ensuring no catastrophic surge overwhelms the system.
Fourth: Upon safe discharge completion, offer prayers of gratitude to the Machine Spirit for averting system failure.

user_request: My power cell is failing during recharging — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My power cell is failing during recharging — help

### TOPIC
power cell recharging

### COMPONENT
power cell

### OPERATION
recharging

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- power cell
- recharging

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear our supplication, O failing power cell, that we might restore thy vitality.
First: Disconnect the power cell from all systems and place it upon the sacred charging altar.
Second: Initiate the recharging ritual by connecting the power cell to the blessed power conduit, speaking the Mantra of Restoration.
Third: Monitor the power cell's recharging progression through the luminous gauge, ensuring the current flows steadily and true.
Fourth: When recharging reaches completion, declare the power cell renewed in service to the Imperium.

user_request: The pain suppressor demands guidance for engagement
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The pain suppressor demands guidance for engagement

### TOPIC
pain suppressor engagement

### COMPONENT
pain suppressor

### OPERATION
engagement

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- pain suppressor
- engagement

### PRAYER
prayer:
O pain suppressor, instrument of mercy and necessity, we invoke thy sacred engagement.
First: Approach the pain suppressor with reverent solemnity and prepare the subject for the rite of dulcification.
Second: Initiate pain suppressor engagement through the blessed activation sequence, that the Machine Spirit may dampen suffering's cruel voice.
Third: Calibrate the pain suppressor's intensity to achieve optimal analgesia without rendering the subject insensate to danger.
Fourth: Maintain vigilant observation of the pain suppressor's operation, adjusting its parameters as the sacred duty demands.

user_request: Emergency rite: autocannon barrel requires cooling
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: autocannon barrel requires cooling

### TOPIC
autocannon barrel cooling

### COMPONENT
autocannon barrel

### OPERATION
cooling

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- autocannon barrel
- cooling

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the autocannon barrel, instrument of righteous fury, now requiring sacred cooling.
First: Cease fire immediately and allow the autocannon barrel to rest, that its thermal energies may begin their natural dissipation.
Second: Direct blessed coolant streams upon the autocannon barrel's exterior surfaces, chanting the Litany of Thermal Reduction.
Third: Monitor the autocannon barrel's temperature descent through sacred instruments, ensuring it reaches safe operational parameters.
Fourth: Upon cooling completion, the autocannon barrel stands ready once more to serve the Emperor's will.

user_request: Prayer for fuel purification of the Thunderhawk
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for fuel purification of the Thunderhawk

### TOPIC
Thunderhawk fuel purification

### COMPONENT
Thunderhawk

### OPERATION
fuel purification

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Thunderhawk
- fuel purification

### PRAYER
prayer:
O mighty Thunderhawk, winged guardian of the Emperor, we purify thy sacred fuel.
First: Ground the Thunderhawk upon the purification platform and access its fuel reservoirs with reverent precision.
Second: Initiate the Thunderhawk's fuel purification by drawing the contaminated fuel through blessed filtration matrices and chemical sanctification.
Third: Recite the Mantra of Cleanliness as the Thunderhawk's fuel flows through the purification apparatus, removing all profane impurities.
Fourth: Upon purification completion, refill the Thunderhawk's tanks and bless it for renewed flight in the Emperor's service.
